productDisplayName: Nike Men Killshot 2 Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for absolute comfort, the nike Killshot 2 shoe is absolutely stylish and versatile for those who love a comfort shoe. Made for racquet ball, the shoe's stylish look means it doubles up as great lifestyle footwear. <b>Upper</b>Velvetty synthetic upper with suede overlaysHigh ankleMesh innerCentral lacingPadded inner and tongue <b>Midsole</b>Thick rubber midsole <b>Outsole</b>Flexible rubber outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves <b>Shoe care</b>Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
